name: 72W 2x36W Up & Down Led WallPack Fixture Light – ETL Certified
description: Features: Versatile Color Options: Offers RGB lighting along with 3000K (Warm White) & 6000K (Cool White) for custom ambiance. Efficient & Powerful Illumination: Delivers 5280 lumens at 110 LM/W, ensuring bright and energy-efficient lighting. Durable & Weatherproof: Built with IP66-rated aluminum housing, making it waterproof and resistant to harsh weather conditions. Wide Beam & Coverage: 60° beam angle provides focused yet effective up-and-down lighting for walls, pathways, and facades. Certified & Reliable: ETL-listed, features high power factor (≥0.9), and backed by a 5-year warranty.
short_desc: 72W 2x36W Up & Down Led Wall Pack Wall Scone Light – Red, Green & Blue – 3000K, 6000K – ETL Certified. Specifications: Wattage: 48W Color Temperature Options: 3000K, 6000K, Red, Green, Blue Lumen Output: 5,280 Lumens Lumen Efficacy: 110 LM/W Viewing Angle: 60° Input Voltage: 100–277V AC (50/60Hz) Mounting Type: Wall Mount Driver Model: Driver Power Factor: >0.9 Color Rendering Index (CRI): >70 Housing Material: Aluminum Housing Color: Dark Grey Waterproof Rating: IP66 (Wet Rated) Operating Temperature: -4ºF to 113ºF Application: Indoor & Outdoor (Hotels, Motels, Walkways, Commercial Buildings, Architectural Lighting) Fixture Size: 180 x 300 x 64 mm Base Dimensions: 88 x 127 mm Weight: 16 lbs Certifications: ETL Listed Warranty: 5 Years
